en.extract:
The Timor imperial pigeon (Ducula cineracea) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found on Timor and Wetar. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Timor imperial pigeon''' ('''''Ducula cineracea''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Columbidae]]. It is found on [[Timor]] and [[Wetar]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
